how to build an AI-first SaaS in 2026

1. start with a big market. finance, healthcare, real estate. then zoom into a sub-niche.

2. map the niche’s workflow end-to-end. literally write every step they do daily. ex: leads → scheduling → quoting → follow-ups → payments.

3.

Most people will still be “learning AI” in 2026.

A small group will be shipping, automating, and replacing workflows with it.

my 2026 AI predictions:

1) AI adoption explodes. 94% of businesses say they want it, less than 30% have implemented. 

2) service providers that can't prove ROI die. no one pays for "management" anymore.

3) mid-market becomes the biggest AI buyer. enterprises move slow. the
